name: calendar_update
description: Update an existing Google Calendar event. Change the title, time, location, description, or attendees. Only provided fields are updated.

event_id.description: The ID of the event to update (from calendar_list results)

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID (default: 'primary'). Use an email address for shared calendars.

start_time.description: New start time in ISO 8601 format

end_time.description: New end time in ISO 8601 format

attendees.description: Updated list of attendee email addresses (replaces existing attendees)

notify_attendees.description: Whether to send update notifications to attendees (default: false)
